## Summary

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] chore: maintenance / config
- [ ] docs: documentation
- [ ] test: tests only
- [ ] refactor: no functional change

## Checklist

- [ ] mvn verify passes locally (Checkstyle + tests + coverage ≥ 80%)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format
